# PolyTerm

PolyTerm is a no-custody Polymarket intelligence terminal for traders, researchers, data collectors, whale watchers, and external agents.

## Agent Entry Points

- Human docs: `docs/AGENT_MODE.md`
- Full LLM reference: `llms-full.txt`
- Agent config examples: `docs/AGENT_CONFIG_EXAMPLES.md`
- Agent cookbook: `docs/AGENT_COOKBOOK.md`
- Tool manifest: `polyterm agent manifest --format json`
- Schemas: `polyterm agent schemas --format json`
- Doctor: `polyterm agent doctor --skip-network --format json`
- MCP-ready stdio adapter: `polyterm agent mcp-server`
- Static manifest: `docs/tool-manifest.json`
- Static schemas: `docs/schemas/`

## Safe Read-Only Commands

- `polyterm search --format json`
- `polyterm lookup --format json`
- `polyterm orderbook --format json`
- `polyterm chart --format json`
- `polyterm thesis --format json`
- `polyterm research --format json`
- `polyterm explain-move --format json`
- `polyterm compare --format json`
- `polyterm scan-opportunities --format json`
- `polyterm wallets --analyze ADDRESS --refresh --format json`
- `polyterm whales --wallets --format json`
- `polyterm arbitrage --format json`
- `polyterm arbitrage --venues polymarket,kalshi --format json`
- `polyterm export --dataset latest --format json`

## Local-State Mutation Commands

- `polyterm alerts --add-rule price ...`
- Position, notes, bookmarks, presets, and config commands can mutate local SQLite or config state.

## Identifier Rules

- Gamma market IDs and slugs are for discovery.
- CLOB condition IDs identify markets for CLOB workflows.
- CLOB token IDs identify YES/NO order book tokens.
- Data API wallet calls use wallet addresses.

## APIs

- Gamma: `https://gamma-api.polymarket.com`
- Data API: `https://data-api.polymarket.com`
- CLOB: `https://clob.polymarket.com`
- CLOB market websocket: `wss://ws-subscriptions-clob.polymarket.com/ws/market`

PolyTerm does not place trades or manage private keys.
